tooltip.mod_menu_filter.enabled: Master toggle for all filtering. When disabled every mod is visible.
tooltip.mod_menu_filter.sync: Write hidden mods into Mod Menu's own config for full native compatibility.
tooltip.mod_menu_filter.badges: Display coloured tag badges on mod entries in the mod list.
tooltip.mod_menu_filter.auto_hide_libs: Automatically hide all library / API mods from the mod list.
tooltip.mod_menu_filter.dep_protection: Prevent hiding mods that are required dependencies of visible mods.
tooltip.mod_menu_filter.compact_badges: Show abbreviated 3-letter badges to save space.
tooltip.mod_menu_filter.hidden_mods: Mod IDs to hide. These are written to Mod Menu's hidden_mods list.
tooltip.mod_menu_filter.hide_patterns: Java regex patterns matched against mod IDs and names.
tooltip.mod_menu_filter.hide_tag: Hide all mods tagged as %s from the mod list.
tooltip.mod_menu_filter.tag_color: Customise the badge colour for the %s tag.
tooltip.mod_menu_filter.favorites: Favourite mods are always shown, even when their tag is hidden.
tooltip.mod_menu_filter.active_profile: Switch between profiles. Type a new name to create one.
text.mod_menu_filter.hidden_info: Add mod IDs below to hide them from Mod Menu. Changes are synced to Mod Menu's own hidden_mods config on save.
text.mod_menu_filter.tags_info: Toggle entire categories on or off. Expand a tag to see its colour and which of your installed mods it covers.
text.mod_menu_filter.favorites_info: Favourite mods override all hiding rules — they will always be visible in the mod list.
text.mod_menu_filter.profiles_info: Profiles save your current hidden mods, hidden tags, and favourites. Switch profiles to quickly change setups.
text.mod_menu_filter.tag_override_info: Tag assignments are loaded from the built-in database. Override per-mod tags in the JSON config under 'tagOverrides'.
text.mod_menu_filter.regex_info: Regex patterns use Java syntax (e.g. 'fabric-.*' hides all Fabric API sub-modules).
